sentences.target: C'est son métier, pas le mien.

translations.fr: C'est son métier, pas le mien.
translations.es: Es su trabajo, no el mío.
translations.de: Das ist sein Job, nicht meiner.
translations.it: È il suo lavoro, non il mio.
translations.ko: 그건 그의 일이에요, 제 일이 아니에요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这是他的工作，不是我的。
translations.yue: 呢份工係佢嘅，唔係我嘅。
translations.ru: Это его работа, а не моя.
translations.pt: É o trabalho dele, não o meu.
translations.vi: Đó là công việc của anh ấy, không phải của tôi.
translations.nl: Het is zijn baan, niet de mijne.
translations.uk: Це його робота, а не моя.
translations.hu: Ez az ő munkája, nem az enyém.
translations.hi: यह उसका काम है, मेरा नहीं.
translations.el: Είναι η δουλειά του, όχι η δική μου.
translations.nb: Det er jobben hans, ikke min.
translations.sv: Det är hans jobb, inte mitt.
translations.ro: Este jobul lui, nu al meu.
translations.cs: Je to jeho práce, ne moje.
translations.da: Det er hans job, ikke mit.
translations.fi: Se on hänen työnsä, ei minun.
translations.ja: それは彼の仕事で、私のではありません。

tokens.explanation: Clitic pronoun 'ce' + copular 'est' (present of être); introduces an identification/equation with the predicate noun phrase.
Possessive determiner agreeing masculine singular with 'métier'; marks possession.
Common noun (masculine) meaning trade/profession; head of the noun phrase.
Negation particle used elliptically for contrast ('not'); here opposing to 'le mien'.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the possessive pronoun.
Possessive pronoun (masc. sg.) standing for 'mon métier'.

sentences.target: Tu veux faire ce métier plus tard.
sentences.reading: /ty vø fɛʁ sə metje ply taʁ/

translations.fr: Tu veux faire ce métier plus tard.
translations.ipa: /ty vø fɛʁ sə metje ply taʁ/
translations.en: You want to do this job later.
translations.es: Quieres hacer este trabajo más adelante.
translations.de: Du willst später in diesem Beruf arbeiten.
translations.it: Vuoi fare questo lavoro da grande.
translations.ko: 너는 나중에 이 일을 하고 싶어 해.
translations.ru: Ты хочешь в будущем заниматься этой профессией.
translations.pt: Você quer fazer esse trabalho no futuro.
translations.he: אתה רוצה לעשות את המקצוע הזה בעתיד.
translations.tr: Sen bu işi ileride yapmak istiyorsun.
translations.vi: Con muốn làm công việc này sau này.
translations.ar: أنت تريد أن تقوم بهذا العمل لاحقًا.
translations.nl: Je wilt dit werk later doen.
translations.uk: Ти хочеш у майбутньому займатися цією професією.
translations.hu: Később ezt a munkát szeretnéd végezni.
translations.hi: तुम आगे चलकर यह काम करना चाहते हो.
translations.pl: Chcesz w przyszłości wykonywać ten zawód.
translations.el: Θέλεις να κάνεις αυτή τη δουλειά αργότερα.
translations.nb: Du vil gjøre denne jobben senere.
translations.id: Kamu ingin melakukan pekerjaan ini nanti.
translations.sv: Du vill göra det här jobbet senare.
translations.ro: Vrei să practici meseria asta mai târziu.
translations.da: Du vil gerne have dette job senere.
translations.ja: 将来この仕事をしたい。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun (informal).
Main verb, present indicative 2sg; takes an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement to 'veux'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'métier'.
Common noun (masculine) meaning trade/profession; direct object of 'faire'.
Adverb; with 'tard' forms the time adverbial 'plus tard' meaning 'later'.
Adverb; with 'plus' expresses 'later'.

sentences.target: Il adore son métier de pâtissier.

translations.fr: Il adore son métier de pâtissier.
translations.en: He loves his job as a pastry chef.
translations.es: Le encanta su trabajo de pastelero.
translations.de: Er liebt seinen Job als Konditor.
translations.it: Adora il suo lavoro di pasticcere.
translations.ko: 그는 제과사로 하는 일을 아주 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他热爱自己作为糕点师的工作。
translations.yue: 佢好鍾意自己做糕點師嘅工作。
translations.pt: Ele adora o trabalho dele como confeiteiro.
translations.he: הוא אוהב את העבודה שלו כקונדיטור.
translations.vi: Anh ấy rất yêu công việc thợ làm bánh của mình.
translations.nl: Hij is dol op zijn baan als banketbakker.
translations.hi: वह अपनी पेस्ट्री शेफ की नौकरी से बहुत प्यार करता है.
translations.pl: On uwielbia swoją pracę jako cukiernik.
translations.el: Λατρεύει τη δουλειά του ως ζαχαροπλάστης.
translations.nb: Han elsker jobben sin som konditor.
translations.id: Dia sangat menyukai pekerjaannya sebagai pembuat kue.
translations.sv: Han älskar sitt jobb som konditor.
translations.da: Han elsker sit arbejde som konditor.
translations.ja: 彼はパティシエとしての仕事が大好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Third-person singular subject pronoun (masculine).
Main verb, present indicative 3sg; expresses strong liking.
Possessive determiner agreeing masculine singular with 'métier'.
Common noun (masculine) meaning trade/profession; direct object of 'adore'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement specifying the field/role.
Common noun (masculine) denoting the profession; complements 'métier' via 'de'.

sentences.target: On change de métier cette année.

translations.fr: On change de métier cette année.
translations.de: Wir wechseln dieses Jahr den Beruf.
translations.ru: В этом году мы меняем профессию.
translations.pt: Este ano vamos mudar de carreira.
translations.vi: Năm nay chúng tôi chuyển nghề.
translations.nl: Dit jaar veranderen we van beroep.
translations.hi: हम इस साल करियर बदल रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 今年、私たちは転職します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as colloquial 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg (with 'on' as subject); takes the pattern 'changer de + NOUN'.
Preposition; in the construction 'changer de + NOUN' marks the thing being changed.
Common noun (masculine); complement of 'de' indicating what is being changed.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'année'.
Common noun (feminine) denoting time period; forms a temporal adverbial.

On change de métier cette année.
